description_long: This is a stylized child figure with a youthful appearance, featuring a round face, large ears, and short, tousled hair. The child is dressed in a fitted, long-sleeve shirt with horizontal stripes and a pair of straight-cut pants. The figure's arms are extended outward in a relaxed, neutral pose, and the hands are open with fingers slightly spread. The child wears casual shoes and has a small pouch or accessory attached to the right side of the waistband. The proportions and features suggest a playful, animated character suitable for urban or neighborhood environments. The overall design is simple yet expressive, with clear, defined clothing and accessories.
description: A stylized child figure in a striped long-sleeve shirt, pants, and casual shoes, standing with arms outstretched and a small pouch at the waist.
description_view_0: Front view showing the child's face, striped shirt, outstretched arms, and full body details.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the arm's length, and the side of the pants and shoes.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, shirt, pants, and the pouch attached to the waistband.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, arm, and the pouch more clearly.
attribute_clothing_type: long-sleeve knit shirt and straight-cut pants with a small waist pouch
attribute_hairstyle: short, tousled hair with uneven layers
